reasoning: The forecast resolves to YES if Barcelona reaches the 2026 UEFA Champions League semifinal. Barcelona played the first leg of their quarterfinal matchup against Atlético Madrid on April 8, 2026, losing 2-0 at home. During the match, Barcelona defender Pau Cubarsí was sent off with a red card, meaning he will miss the second leg. Consequently, Barcelona heads into the second away leg needing to win by at least two goals just to force extra time. Reflecting these difficult circumstances, Polymarket bettors have accurately priced Barcelona's odds of advancing to the semifinal at roughly 27% (a steep drop from roughly 70% before the first leg). Because Atlético Madrid is notoriously strong defensively and has a two-goal advantage at home, this 27% implied probability seems well-calibrated and fully represents the uphill battle Barcelona faces. I am anchoring my base estimate to the Polymarket odds, providing slightly increasing values to accommodate the required output format.
